title: Shop Villager
description: You can create custom villager trade within the game.
body:
# Description
This datapack modifies the villager trade list.

# Summon
You can summon a resident using the following command:
```
/function shopvillage:villager
```

# How to use
![villager barrel ui. edited for ease of understanding.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/399f68b7c0a8f772652ae52b9599da04d714371e.png)
* Green square: The first 'cost' item.
* Blue square: _Optional._ The second 'cost' item.
* Red square: The item being sold for each set of cost items.
* (A) Villager ↔ Wandering Trader
* (B) Villager level. the current level of this villager's profession.
* (C) Villager type(biome).
* (D) Spawn Egg get.
* (E) Villager x rotation.
* (F) Villager profession.
* (G) Villager kill
* (H) DONE
* (I) if true(1b), this entity is silenced.

![place additional barrels under the barrel.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbfd9be3ac5eded84a4545d0528b38d8edca2f08.png)
**(1.20.5+)** Increase the villager trade list by place additional barrels under the barrel. (up to 10)
